name: Curried Yogurt Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the yogurt and curry powder.
2. Stir in the lemon juice, honey, black pepper, and hot pepper sauce until well mixed.
3. Spoon the dip into a serving bowl.
4. If possible, allow it to set at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
5. Garnish with finely chopped almonds or walnuts, if desired.
6. Makes 1 cup.
7. Serve with fresh vegetables or pita crisps.
